overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an open-world game (GTA IV) showing a character walking through an urban environment. The character crosses busy intersections and walks along sidewalks in a detailed city setting with commercial and residential buildings under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with multiple lanes

events.description: silver sedan passes left to right in front of character
character weaves between moving vehicles while crossing the wide intersection
character steps onto sidewalk from crosswalk, leaving the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across a wide multi-lane intersection, navigating between moving vehicles including sedans and taxis

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection from left to right
black car waiting at the intersection for crossing pedestrian

entered.detail: tall multi-story brick office building with many windows dominating the skyline
row of commercial shops with colorful awnings including a green and yellow storefront
tall concrete retaining wall running along the right side of the street
zebra-striped pedestrian crossing painted on asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character begins crossing a wide urban intersection surrounded by commercial buildings. Vehicles move through the intersection as the character navigates the crosswalk, with a tall brick office building visible in the distance and a concrete wall on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk transition from commercial to residential district

events.description: passing graffiti-covered bus shelter with glass panels
walking past pile of black garbage bags and cardboard on sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past storefronts and transitioning into a residential area with brownstone buildings

entered.detail: glass and metal bus stop shelter covered in green and white graffiti
classic brownstone residential buildings with stone stoops and iron railings
elevated railway structure with metal supports crossing the street ahead
black garbage bags and discarded cardboard on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the sidewalk past a graffitied bus shelter and black trash bags. The environment transitions from commercial to residential as brownstone buildings appear on the left, with elevated train tracks visible in the distance ahead.

events.description: waiting at crosswalk for traffic light to change
crossing street alongside two other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing the intersection alongside two other pedestrians while traffic waits

notable_agents.action: person in purple shirt crossing the street in the same direction
person in gray hoodie carrying white shopping bags crossing the street

entered.detail: tall red-brick apartment building with multiple windows at the next intersection
mature deciduous trees lining the sidewalk with autumn foliage

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a residential sidewalk lined with trees, approaching the next intersection. Two other pedestrians are met at the crosswalk, and all three cross the street together as the traffic light changes, with a prominent red apartment building visible ahead.

events.description: passing discarded cardboard boxes and trash bags on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past urban debris and ground-level storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple shirt walking away down the sidewalk ahead

entered.detail: ground-level commercial windows with metal security gates and signage
discarded cardboard boxes and black trash bags piled on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the character continues along the sidewalk past discarded cardboard boxes and trash bags. The area features a mix of residential and commercial properties with storefront windows on the right, and a pedestrian is visible ahead walking in the same direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense urban environment that transitions from a busy commercial intersection into a residential neighborhood. It begins with the character navigating a wide crosswalk surrounded by commercial buildings and moving traffic, with a tall brick office building looming in the distance. As the character moves onto the sidewalk, the scene shifts past a graffitied bus shelter and black trash bags, with the architecture transitioning into brownstones as elevated train tracks appear ahead. The camera then follows the character along a tree-lined residential street to a second intersection, where they cross the street alongside other pedestrians toward a prominent red apartment building. Finally, the movement continues past discarded cardboard boxes and storefront windows, following a distant pedestrian through a mixed-use area of residential and commercial properties.
